name: Dave LaRue
description:
'''Dave LaRue''' is an American [[bassist]] who performed with the [[Dixie Dregs]] from 1988 to 2017 and with guitarist [[Steve Morse]]'s Band since 1989. He also has worked with [[Dream Theater|Dream Theater's]] [[John Petrucci]], [[Mike Portnoy]], [[Derek Sherinian]] and [[Jordan Rudess]]. He plays [[Music Man (company)|Music Man]] [[bass guitars]], among them the "Grilver" and "StingRay 5 five-string" but has mainly switched to their "Bongo" line (which he was instrumental in helping develop) including four- and five-string fretted and fretless models. From March 2006 to September 2006, he toured with [[Joe Satriani]] on the [[Super Colossal]] tour.
Most recently, LaRue became a member of the supergroup [[Flying Colors (band)|Flying Colors]] alongside long-time bandmate Steve Morse.
